name: AI Agent Full Implementation
description: Complete AI agent implementation workflow: analyze requirements, validate provider, configure agent, register tools, set security, deploy, and monitor.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze business requirements, target channels (Discuss, activities, tasks), and agent responsibilities

steps.name: Validate LLM Provider
steps.description: Validate the chosen ai.provider configuration for credentials, base URL, and security

steps.name: Configure AI Agent
steps.description: Create ai.agent with system prompt, welcome message, model, provider, memory, and handoff settings

steps.name: Register and Bind Tools
steps.description: Create ai.tool records with valid JSON schemas and bind them to the agent

steps.name: Set Up Security
steps.description: Configure security groups, record rules, and encrypted credential access for AI resources

steps.name: Deploy Agent
steps.description: Deploy the agent to Discuss channels, activity types, or project tasks

steps.name: Monitor Usage and Iterate
steps.description: Enable usage tracking, set limits, review logs, and refine prompts/tools based on feedback
